design doc exists at docs/specs/2026-07-11-editor-window-width.md
specifies the entry-widen / exit-restore approach for SDL2ST_EDIT
resolves SDL logical-size vs window-size and aspect-ratio/letterboxing

New primitive sdl2_renderer_set_logical_width(ctx, w): idempotent (no-op when w==current), windowed grows physical window width via new_win_w=(w*win_h)/logical_height BEFORE SDL_RenderSetLogicalSize, fullscreen changes logical only; returns -1 on NULL ctx or w<=0

mode_edit_enter widens to SDL2R_LOGICAL_WIDTH+EDITOR_TOOL_WIDTH (695); new mode_edit_exit restores SDL2R_LOGICAL_WIDTH (575); .on_exit registered on SDL2ST_EDIT (currently missing at game_modes.c ~1592)

render_main_background tiles using sdl2_renderer_get_logical_size(ctx->renderer,&w,&h) instead of compile-time SDL2R_LOGICAL_WIDTH/HEIGHT macros, so the widened panel gets the tiled space background not bare black
No changes to PALETTE_X/PALETTE_W or any scoring/physics/level constant; play area geometry provably unchanged (scale_x==scale_y preserved)

Capture pipeline registers an 'editor' screen per docs/TESTING.md 4-place checklist (vc name fn + vc_check branch in game_init.c; -visual-capture map in sdl2_cli.c; visual-check screen list in Makefile) so Gate 4 capture is reproducible
make test (ctest debug) green; make asan-test green; zero new warnings under the -Werror base set

Unit tests in tests/test_sdl2_renderer.c for sdl2_renderer_set_logical_width: (a) widen -> get_logical_size returns new width, height unchanged; (b) windowed physical window width grew proportionally (aspect-ratio-preserved, style of existing test_custom_scale/test_window_size_default_scale); (c) widen then restore returns the EXACT original window width; (d) no-op call with current width leaves window size byte-identical; (e) NULL ctx and w<=0 return -1

Integration coverage for the SDL2ST_EDIT round trip using the setup_editor fixture: INTRO->EDIT get_logical_size == 695; EDIT->INTRO == 575; EDIT->GAME == 575; GAME->EDIT == 695, via sdl2_state_transition (no keystroke injection). New build-time helper tools/capture_screen.c (not installed; mirror the gen_bonus_fixtures pattern at CMakeLists.txt:684-693): usage 'capture_screen <mode> <out.bmp>' where <mode> maps a name (at minimum 'editor'->SDL2ST_EDIT; also wire the attract modes intro/instruct/demo/keys/keysedit/preview/highscore/bonus/game for reuse) — creates a game context via game_create with -nosound, forces SDL_VIDEODRIVER=offscreen (set via setenv before game_create if not already set), transitions to the mode via sdl2_state_transition, advances a stabilization number of ticks (reuse the sdl2_loop_update / advance pattern), captures via SDL_RenderReadPixels + SDL_SaveBMP to <out.bmp> (reuse the exact readback pattern from tests/test_attract_screenshots.c:68-95), destroys the context, returns 0 on success / non-zero + stderr on failure

Runs headless on macOS: SDL_VIDEODRIVER=offscreen ./build/capture_screen editor .tmp/modern-editor.bmp produces a 695x720 (editor is widened) BMP with real pixels (non-black); verify the BMP exists and has plausible size, and report its dimensions
